title: B7 5RX, Eyas Global Limited: environmental permit issued – EPR/AP3392EM/V005
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:    Operator name: Eyas Global Limited   Installation name: Eyas Global Limited   Permit number: EPR/AP3392EM/V005   "
